data.content:
The build confirms the file is generated (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`) but the compiler doesn't see it. The root cause is classic: **the generated file is not added to the `Compile` item group**. SDK-style projects resolve globs at evaluation time (before targets run), so the file doesn't exist yet when items are collected.

The fix: add the generated file to `<Compile>` and `<FileWrites>` inside the target.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add generated file to compilation and register for clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but it never adds the generated file to the `Compile` item group. Since SDK-style projects resolve their `Compile` items via globbing at evaluation time (before any targets run), the generated file isn't picked up automatically because it doesn't exist yet during evaluation.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, and also register it with `FileWrites` so it gets cleaned properly.

Let me use the including-generated-files skill since it's directly relevant.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add generated file to compilation and register for clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
**Diagnosis:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote the file to `obj/` at build time, but never told the compiler about it. SDK-style projects expand `Compile` globs at **evaluation time** (before any targets execute), so the file didn't exist yet to be globbed.

**Fix:** Added an `<ItemGroup>` inside the target to:
1. **`<Compile Include="...">`** — adds the generated file to compilation
2. **`<FileWrites Include="...">`** — registers it so `dotnet clean` removes it
